title: MANGA NGE Possible cover for volume 10
display_title: MANGA NGE Possible cover for volume 10
wikitext:
[]: [NGE] Possible cover for volume 10.             Quote Post by Cyburn » Mon Feb 13, 2006 5:41 am Looks good, cant wait for an English release.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Feb 13, 2006 9:24 am That looks really cool.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Feb 13, 2006 10:33 am That definitely is the cover. The subject is right, the release info is right, and The Price Is Right. If memory serves me well, we could see this in English 3-6 months after the Japanese release. So if it comes out in late march, we might see it between June-September. Here's to wishful thinking.

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Mon Feb 13, 2006 2:23 pm Meh. It needs more Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Feb 13, 2006 2:54 pm Ryo wrote: Meh. It needs more Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Mon Feb 13, 2006 3:18 pm oh my eva-01, Rei is suffering :cry: :cry: but it's a good cover

[]:             Quote Post by Phoenix Feet » Mon Feb 13, 2006 7:38 pm Does anyone know how long it usually takes Chuang Yi to get their translations done?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Feb 13, 2006 8:54 pm Phoenix Feet wrote: Chuang Yi

[]:             Quote Post by Phoenix Feet » Mon Feb 13, 2006 9:23 pm Chuang Yi are a Singapore-based manga importer/distributor, who also do their own translating. Madman Entertainment, the company that holds the exclusive licence to distribute NGE in Australia (along with a spate of other titles) slightly repackage Chuang Yi's versions and sell them here. I think. So I guess you don't know then? :)

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Feb 13, 2006 10:06 pm So, people in Singapore get their Eva in English?

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Mon Feb 13, 2006 10:19 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: So, people in Singapore get their Eva in English?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Feb 13, 2006 11:01 pm SEELE 08 wrote: Singapore's language is English.....

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Feb 14, 2006 12:39 am Is that supposed to be a core or something on Rei in that image?

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Tue Feb 14, 2006 12:46 am No that's just part of her normal plugsuit

[]:             Quote Post by Phoenix Feet » Tue Feb 14, 2006 12:03 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: SEELE 08 wrote: Singapore's language is English.....

[]:             Quote Post by Carl Horn » Tue Feb 14, 2006 1:09 pm Phoenix Feet wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: SEELE 08 wrote: Singapore's language is English.....

[]:             Quote Post by darth_mark » Tue Feb 14, 2006 2:22 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: SEELE 08 wrote: Singapore's language is English.....

[]:             Quote Post by Ayanami » Tue Feb 14, 2006 7:46 pm Oooh, awesome. Can't wait. <3333

[]:             Quote Post by the3rdchildren » Wed Feb 15, 2006 12:23 am Curse you and your artistic abilities, Sadamoto. Each manga cover looks just that bit nicer, it's a real shame there are no larger posters or wallpapers are made available for those of us who worship this man's talent. Now I'm done jerking him off, does anyone else think that cover looks a lot cleaner than the other ones? Almost as if aspects were digital (mostly the colouring, so just the one aspect then). Then again, maybe I'm just insane.

[]:             Quote Post by Sound Only » Wed Feb 15, 2006 3:45 am Pretty nifty. Too bad my country probably won't see it until a good year after it's Japan release... damn you, publishing giants!
